resolvedGaps.closure: Authentication evidence now feeds CandidateSearchSpec and PatientLinkDecision; it never creates patient binding by itself.
PatientLinkDecision requires P_link, interval bounds, calibrator version, and confidenceModelState.
Threshold matrix requires runner-up ceiling and gap_logit checks before durable auto-link.
PDS enrichment is a disabled-by-default provider port with legal-basis, onboarding, and secure-connectivity gates.
contactClaims, pdsDemographics, and patientPreferredComms are separate domains with overwrite forbidden.
Patient-facing same-shell states and recovery hierarchy are serialized in the state registry and board parity tables.
Future and repair route families have explicit manual-review-only threshold rows instead of missing contract space.
